prompt: An abstract background based on pop art and street art with influences from contemporary anime and manga. No people, characters, or text. Composed mainly of sharp, clean line art and flat shading, with vibrant, high-contrast neon colors (pink, cyan, yellow, purple, electric blue). A dynamic layout featuring overlapping complex geometric patterns and bold shapes. Emphasis on gradients and textures using Ben-Day dots and screen tones. Adds street art elements like paint splatters and ink drips, resulting in a stylish and energetic 2D illustration background that merges retro comics with modern anime expressions.
